calculations.formulaNote: effective_hours = ai_hours × 1.2 ÷ 0.90; calendar_days = effective_hours ÷ 8 ÷ team_size. Per-task sum (77h) lands below headline point (85h); difference absorbs integration, reviewer cycles, and cross-backend subtleties not attributable to a single task.

tasks.subject: Store interface delta + TestStore mirror + Entry/Event evolution
Client-side tenant state, registry, and cache scaffolding
Postgres tenant storage + schema evolution + trigger rewrite
MongoDB tenant storage + index evolution + delete-event handling
Client read/write/delete paths + changefeed routing + debouncer widening + OnTenantChange dispatch
Admin HTTP tenant routes + WithTenantAuthorizer option + default-deny escalation
api_compat_test.go pin + comprehensive Client-layer unit test suite
Migration doc + CLAUDE.md systemplane-section update + README changelog

criticalPathNote: Solo mode forces strict serialization. Parallelization opportunities (T3 ∥ T4, T2 ∥ T3/4, T7 pre-write, T9 overlap) are unused with team size 1.

riskMilestones.risk: MongoDB delete-event semantics (no fullDocument), index rebuild on existing populated collection, polling-mode tenant event parity
riskMilestones.mitigation: Run testcontainers-go replica-set integration test (mongodb.WithReplicaSet('rs0')) before moving to Task 5. Verify re-read fallback correctness per TRD §3.2. Manual smoke of old-index-drop sequence on dirty collection.

riskMilestones.risk: testcontainers orchestration reliability, MongoDB replica-set bootstrap brittleness, 100-goroutine race test may surface new races, sub-microsecond GetForTenant hit target may require profile-guided tuning to meet PRD AC15
riskMilestones.mitigation: Allocate all contingency buffer here first. Budget up to 2 additional business days if benchmarks miss PRD AC15. Defensive split to 8a (contract+integration) + 8b (race+bench) if day-14 pressure mounts.

parallelizationOpportunities.description: Tasks 3 and 4 can run in parallel after Task 1
Task 2 can overlap with Tasks 3 and 4
Task 7 can pre-write against signatures from Task 2
parallelizationOpportunities.unusedBecause: Solo mode; risky for estimation confidence even with 2 devs

parallelizationOpportunities.description: Task 9 docs can refine in parallel with Tasks 6-8

milestones.name: Foundation
milestones.exitGate: go build succeeds; testStoreAdapter tenantID smoke test passes; AC2 holds in-memory

milestones.name: Postgres Path
milestones.exitGate: Postgres testcontainer round-trip of Set/Get/List tenant methods green; AC3/AC9/AC10 hold on Postgres

milestones.name: MongoDB Parity
milestones.exitGate: MongoDB replica-set testcontainer green on same round-trip battery; AC13 foundation laid

milestones.name: Subscriber Semantics
milestones.exitGate: AC7 (OnTenantChange), AC8 (OnChange non-fire — critical regression pin), AC12 (debouncer), AC14 (admin) all pass

milestones.name: Tests + Docs
milestones.exitGate: make ci green; make test-integration green on both backends; benchmarks meet AC15 (<1µs hit, <2µs miss); MIGRATION_TENANT_SCOPED.md + CLAUDE.md + README updated

contingency.escalationTrigger: If Task 4 or Task 8 consumes >1.5× its point estimate, notify user and re-plan scope (drop MongoDB polling-mode parity from T4 or defer benchmarks from T8)

flags: No task pushes past the 2026-05-12 contingency target, even at upper-bound estimates.
Task 8 at upper bound (14 AI-hours → 18.67 effective hours → 2.33 business days) is the single task closest to exhausting its slot.

If Task 4 AND Task 8 both hit upper bounds, cumulative = 106.67 effective hours = 13.33 business days, leaving 0.8 day buffer for Task 9. Re-plan trigger if both low-confidence tasks surface unknowns.
